notableEvents.label: Miguel Rojas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Rojas singles on a ground ball to shortstop Ryan Kreidler, deflected by third baseman Brooks Lee.

notableEvents.label: Shohei Ohtani GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Shohei Ohtani grounds into a double play, second baseman Luke Keaschall to shortstop Ryan Kreidler to first baseman Royce Lewis. Miguel Rojas out at 2nd. Shohei Ohtani out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Alex Freeland pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Alex Freeland singles on a line drive to right fielder Kody Clemens.

notableEvents.label: Austin Martin pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Austin Martin grounds out, second baseman Tommy Edman to first baseman Freddie Freeman.

notableEvents.label: Austin Martin pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Austin Martin singles on a sharp ground ball to center fielder Andy Pages.
